services.name: TV Repair
services.description: We provide expert repair services for all types of TVs including LED, LCD, Plasma, and Smart TVs. Our trained technicians quickly diagnose and fix screen, sound, and connectivity issues.

services.name: AC Repair
services.description: Our AC repair service covers split, window, and central ACs. We specialize in cooling efficiency improvement, gas refilling, compressor repair, and overall servicing.

services.name: Washing Machine Repair
services.description: From front-load to top-load washing machines, we handle drum issues, motor faults, drainage problems, and electronic board repairs with genuine spare parts.

services.name: Refrigerator Repair
services.description: Our refrigerator repair covers single door, double door, and side-by-side fridges. We fix cooling problems, gas leaks, thermostat issues, and unusual noise problems.

services.name: Microwave Repair
services.description: We service solo, grill, and convection microwaves. Our technicians fix heating issues, door switch problems, sparking, and rotating plate faults.

services.name: Dishwasher Repair
services.description: We repair all dishwasher types ensuring effective cleaning and drying. We handle water leakage, drainage issues, control panel errors, and noise reduction.
